text: Stepping through this stark glass entryway, I am struck by the sense of order and sterility. The world here is constructed and curated—a space promising insight and invention. As I enter the vibrant R&D zone, my eyes are drawn to the bold colors and swirling patterns. Words about innovation pulse around me. I feel both small and curious, like a wanderer on the edge of new ideas, pondering how knowledge is shaped by our environments. The contrast between the two rooms—one all calm anticipation, the other brimming with possibility—gives me a sense of eager potential waiting to be discovered.
